title: Fancy stack loses: hard numbers on simplicity
meta_description: Cut dashboard response time 60% with PostgreSQL 16 queries and minimal JavaScript — the exact stack that replaced a Node.js 20 microservice plan.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams burn $8k+ rewriting apps because they fear the old stack.

We tried Node.js 20, Lambda, DynamoDB — cost $1.2k in 5 weeks.

Switched to Express + PostgreSQL + HTMX.

https://kubaik.github.io/fancy-stack-loses-hard-numbers-on-simplicity

#Web3 #JavaScript #JS #PostgreSQL

Done this differently? Tell me what worked.
